name: cruciate-hub
description: Shared brand and marketing resources for social.plus. Two plugins: marketing-team (16 skills, full kit) and brand-kit (2 skills, for non-marketing colleagues).

plugins.name: marketing-team
plugins.description: The complete marketing kit for social.plus — 16 skills covering content, design, SEO, linking, publishing, and media. For the marketing team.

plugins.name: brand-kit
plugins.description: The minimum on-brand kit for social.plus — brand voice and design system. For non-marketing teammates who need to stay on-brand.
